notes: Basic Galaga skeleton works with shooting, diving enemies, and lives, but formation is sparse (only 4 columns, no entry animations, no boss capture mechanic, returning enemies fly through formation instead of rejoining, explosion radius uses wrong life ratio), and visuals are minimal geometric shapes far from authentic Galaga sprites.
A basic space shooter that lacks iconic Galaga mechanics (tractor beam, fly-ins) and contains severe array mutation bugs during iteration.
Playable but notably incomplete as Galaga, with simplified formations/attacks, no capture or challenge mechanics, crude visuals, and some fragile collision/state handling.
